mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.short_title as shortTitle, a.summary, a.picture as cover, a.user_id as userId, a.category_id as categoryId, a.url_slug as slug, a.source as sourceType, a.source_url as sourceUrl, a.status, a.read_type as readType, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_time as updateTime FROM article a WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, title, summary, user_id as userId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, summary, user_id as userId, status, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime FROM article WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (user_id, article_type, title, short_title, url_slug, picture, summary, category_id, source, source_url, offical_stat, topping_stat, cream_stat, status, deleted, read_type, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, 1, #{title}, #{shortTitle}, '', #{cover}, #{summary}, #{categoryId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceUrl}, 0, 0, 0, #{status}, 0, 1, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
INSERT INTO read_count (document_id, document_type, cnt) VALUES (#{id}, 1, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cnt = cnt + 1
UPDATE article SET update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id as articleId, a.title, a.short_title as shortTitle, a.summary, IFNULL(a.picture, '') as cover, a.user_id as authorId, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as author, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as authorName, IFNULL(ui.photo, '') as authorAvatar, a.category_id as categoryId, a.url_slug as slug, CASE a.source WHEN 1 THEN '转载' WHEN 2 THEN '原创' WHEN 3 THEN '翻译' ELSE '' END as sourceName, a.source as sourceType, a.source_url as sourceUrl, a.status, a.read_type as readType, IFNULL(rc.cnt, 0) as readCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_foot uf WHERE uf.document_id = a.id AND uf.document_type = 1 AND uf.praise_stat = 1) as likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.article_id = a.id AND c.deleted = 0) as commentCount, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_time as updateTime FROM article a LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON a.user_id = ui.user_id AND ui.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN read_count rc ON rc.document_id = a.id AND rc.document_type = 1 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.topping_stat DESC, a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT category_id as categoryId, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 GROUP BY category_id

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
AND category_id = #{categoryId}

SELECT a.id as articleId, a.title, a.short_title as shortTitle, a.summary, ad.content, IFNULL(a.picture, '') as cover, a.user_id as authorId, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as author, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as authorName, IFNULL(ui.photo, '') as authorAvatar, a.category_id as categoryId, a.url_slug as slug, CASE a.source WHEN 1 THEN '转载' WHEN 2 THEN '原创' WHEN 3 THEN '翻译' ELSE '' END as sourceName, a.source as sourceType, a.source_url as sourceUrl, a.status, a.read_type as readType, IFNULL(rc.cnt, 0) as readCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_foot uf WHERE uf.document_id = a.id AND uf.document_type = 1 AND uf.praise_stat = 1) as likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.article_id = a.id AND c.deleted = 0) as commentCount, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_time as updateTime FROM article a LEFT JOIN article_detail ad ON a.id = ad.article_id AND ad.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON a.user_id = ui.user_id AND ui.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN read_count rc ON rc.document_id = a.id AND rc.document_type = 1 WHERE a.id = #{articleId} AND a.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT a.id as articleId, a.title, a.short_title as shortTitle, a.summary, IFNULL(a.picture, '') as cover, a.user_id as authorId, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as author, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as authorName, IFNULL(ui.photo, '') as authorAvatar, a.category_id as categoryId, a.url_slug as slug, CASE a.source WHEN 1 THEN '转载' WHEN 2 THEN '原创' WHEN 3 THEN '翻译' ELSE '' END as sourceName, a.source as sourceType, a.status, a.read_type as readType, IFNULL(rc.cnt, 0) as readCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_foot uf WHERE uf.document_id = a.id AND uf.document_type = 1 AND uf.praise_stat = 1) as likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.article_id = a.id AND c.deleted = 0) as commentCount, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_time as updateTime FROM article a LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON a.user_id = ui.user_id AND ui.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN read_count rc ON rc.document_id = a.id AND rc.document_type = 1 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND (a.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') OR a.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%')) ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%') OR summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{key}, '%'))

SELECT a.id as articleId, a.title, a.short_title as shortTitle, a.summary, IFNULL(a.picture, '') as cover, a.user_id as authorId, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as author, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as authorName, IFNULL(ui.photo, '') as authorAvatar, a.category_id as categoryId, a.url_slug as slug, CASE a.source WHEN 1 THEN '转载' WHEN 2 THEN '原创' WHEN 3 THEN '翻译' ELSE '' END as sourceName, a.source as sourceType, a.status, a.read_type as readType, IFNULL(rc.cnt, 0) as readCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_foot uf WHERE uf.document_id = a.id AND uf.document_type = 1 AND uf.praise_stat = 1) as likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.article_id = a.id AND c.deleted = 0) as commentCount, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_time as updateTime FROM article a INNER JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id AND at.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON a.user_id = ui.user_id AND ui.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN read_count rc ON rc.document_id = a.id AND rc.document_type = 1 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND at.tag_id = #{tagId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article a INNER JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id AND at.deleted = 0 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND at.tag_id = #{tagId}

SELECT a.id as articleId, a.title, a.short_title as shortTitle, a.summary, IFNULL(a.picture, '') as cover, a.user_id as authorId, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as author, IFNULL(ui.user_name, '匿名') as authorName, a.category_id as categoryId, a.url_slug as slug, a.status, a.read_type as readType, IFNULL(rc.cnt, 0) as readCount, a.create_time as createTime, a.update_time as updateTime FROM article a LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON a.user_id = ui.user_id AND ui.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN read_count rc ON rc.document_id = a.id AND rc.document_type = 1 WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 AND a.id != #{articleId} AND a.category_id = (SELECT category_id FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId}) ORDER BY a.create_time DESC LIMIT #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE user_id = #{authorId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
